prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for phenol (13 atoms: O, C×6, H×6) at DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Tier 'standard' used. Exact four-center integrals (no density fitting). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz (not re-optimized). Partial charges by Mulliken (PySCF). Three SCF runs: neutral (charge 0, mult 1), cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). All converged. integrity.trustworthy = true. Charge conservation: sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000. No warnings reported. Most electrophilic site: C atom 3 (f+ = 2.1028319). Most nucleophilic site: O atom 1 (f− = 0.16201477). Dual descriptor most negative on O (−1.1572), most positive on C3 (+2.0319). Results consistent with phenol's ortho/para-directing −OH group. Mulliken Fukui values can yield unphysical negatives on individual atoms for delocalized systems; global charge sums are exact.
